videos.headline: Rohan Jones’ TD cuts the Vols' lead

videos.headline: Kam Shanks’ TD makes it a one-score game for Arkansas
videos.description: Taylen Green connects with Kam Shanks for an Arkansas TD.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Kam Shanks’ TD makes it a one-score game for Arkansas) 2025/10/11 ESHEET

videos.headline: Josh Heupel explains how No. 12 Tennessee held off Arkansas
videos.description: Heupel recaps the Volunteers' performance and credits the defense's ability to hold off the gritty Razorbacks through all four quarters in the 34-31 win.
